jobs.prompt: 16:9 educational editorial illustration for a probability theory lecture on characteristic functions and the Central Limit Theorem. Visualize multiple different abstract wave or frequency curves on the left side — representing characteristic functions of different distributions — all converging and blending into a single smooth symmetric bell curve on the right side. The transformation is graceful and flowing, with blue and terracotta wave patterns merging into a warm ink bell shape. Warm off-white paper background, deep ink contours, premium academic textbook style, generous whitespace. No text, no formulas, no numbers.
